name: pravo-logika
description: Formal logic of legal reasoning on Russian law: legal norm structure, subsumption (applying a norm to facts as a syllogism), interpretation methods, the law/fact distinction, and logical unambiguity of contract wording. Modes: legal review (pravo-logika:review), argument fixing, and clause-check. Not a source of law — statutes and case law are flagged for human verification, never asserted from memory. Builds on the classical logic engine distilled from G. Chelpanov's textbook.

interface.shortDescription: Legal-reasoning logic (RU): review & fix legal argumentation, check subsumption, interpretation, contract wording.
